entity.summary: Multichain decentralized exchange focused on ERC-314 token trading, with current liquidity and recent trading activity concentrated primarily on Avalanche.
entity.notes: The first-party site remains reachable. Current protocol data preserves liquidity on Avalanche, Base, and Ethereum together with non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume. HEI therefore classifies Apex DeFi as active despite its small current scale.

evidence.title: Apex DeFi official site
evidence.notes: The current first-party site remains reachable and preserves the Apex DeFi product identity.

evidence.title: Apex DeFi protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol data identifies Apex DeFi as a multichain AMM serving Avalanche, Base, and Ethereum.

evidence.title: Apex DeFi protocol data endpoint
evidence.notes: Current liquidity and non-zero recent DEX volume support an active classification.
